testcase.name: testExecutorRejectsEventsAfterShutdown
testcase.system-out: 19:43:13.900 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor initialized with cached thread pool executor 19:43:13.983 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- WebhookController initialized. Feishu secret: configured, Slack secret: configured 19:43:13.986 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 19:43:13.986 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully 19:43:13.987 [main] WARN tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Executor is not running, rejecting event: command 19:43:13.989 [main] WARN tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Executor already shut down

testcase.name: testHandleSlackCallbackParsesApproveAction

Feishu secret: not configured, Slack secret: not configured 19:43:14.734 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Received Slack interactive callback 19:43:14.734 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Slack signature verification skipped (no secret configured) 19:43:14.735 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Slack callback parsed: session=worker-session-123, toolCallId=tool-call-456, approved=true 19:43:14.735 [SlackCallback-worker-session-123] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Successfully processed Slack callback resume for session worker-session-123 19:43:14.735 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 19:43:14.735 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully
